heading: Considerations
body:
When you use the `returnScope` option, MongoDB Search only returns the fields
that you configured as `storedSource` within the `embeddedDocument`.
Fields outside of the `embeddedDocument` path (such as fields at the
root level) and fields that are not configured as `storedSource` are
not returned.

In your operator specification, you must specify the full path to the
field that you want to query. When you use the `returnScope` option, you
must make sure all operator specifications paths are nested under the
`returnScope.path`. To query on a field outside the `returnScope.path`,
you must use either the `hasAncestor` or `hasRoot` operator.
To learn more, see:

- [hasAncestor Operator](has-ancestor-ref)

- [hasRoot Operator](has-root-ref)
